title: Registry resolves UK / US / EU only — and UK financials cost money
summary: SpiderCompanyData reads free public registries: UK Companies House, US SEC EDGAR, EU VIES (VAT). A company outside those three jurisdictions returns an empty registry — that is expected, not a failure; never promise a filing for every company. Financials are UK-only and cost ~$0.05/company via OCR (auto-enabled when country_code=GB). UK small/micro filings (AA01/AA02) omit revenue/P&L, so financial fields can be null even when the filing resolves.
references: docs/services/SpiderCompanyData/CLAUDE.md:5 — 'free public registries (US SEC, UK Companies House, EU VIES)'
app/schemas/company_intel.py:29-32 — CompanyDataConfig country 'auto', include_financials UK only ~$0.05
